title: Change pricing for apps using a web UI (not form)
excerpt:
This is a request to be able to update your app’s pricing in the developer center instead of relying on a form. 
Originally posted by @jarisanders – just reposting here for convenience.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
